message:
🐛 Fix 167 test failures across 24 test files (#5275) (#5332)

Root causes and fixes:
- vi.clearAllMocks() does NOT reset mockReturnValue — add explicit
  mock resets in async beforeEach callbacks
- Mock factories return plain functions instead of vi.fn() — wrap
  with vi.fn() so vi.mocked().mockReturnValue() works
- Missing isDemoModeForced and other re-exports in useDemoMode mocks
- Missing CardEmptyState in CardComponents mocks (PR #5265 changes)
- AppStatus.test.tsx: await in non-async callback
- CardChat.test.tsx: scrollIntoView stub for JSDOM, userEvent needs
  advanceTimers option with fake timers
- DynamicCard.test.tsx: localStorage.getItem spy instead of
  Storage.prototype.getItem (not available in JSDOM)
- DataComplianceCards.test.tsx: kubectl mock sequence, SVG className
  vs getAttribute, duplicate text collision
- VClusterStatus.tsx: explicit isLoading: false in useCardLoadingState
- Multiple getByText/getByTitle collisions from component changes

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
